name: evm-audit
description: Deep EVM smart contract security audit system. 500+ checklist items across 19 domains. Parallel sub-agents per vulnerability domain. Covers reentrancy, oracle manipulation, flash loans, proxy patterns, access control, MEV, and more.

capabilities.general_audit: Always-on: common vulnerabilities, storage layout, visibility, events
capabilities.precision_math: Always-on: integer overflow, rounding, decimal handling, basis points
capabilities.erc20_audit: Token interaction: SafeERC20, fee-on-transfer, rebasing, blocklists
capabilities.defi_amm: AMM/DEX: Uniswap V3/V4, liquidity pools, sandwich attacks, slippage
capabilities.defi_lending: Lending: CDP, liquidations, collateral ratios, flash loan attacks
capabilities.defi_staking: Staking: liquid staking, restaking, EigenLayer, reward distribution
capabilities.erc4626_vault: Vaults: share/asset conversion, inflation attack, virtual offset
capabilities.erc4337_aa: Account abstraction: paymasters, session keys, validation
capabilities.bridges: Cross-chain: LayerZero, CCIP, Wormhole, message verification
capabilities.proxies: Upgradeable: UUPS, Transparent, Diamond, storage collisions
capabilities.signatures: Off-chain: EIP-712, permits, replay protection, nonces
capabilities.governance: DAO: voting, timelocks, multi-sig, quorum manipulation
capabilities.oracles: Price feeds: Chainlink, TWAP, Pyth, staleness checks
capabilities.assembly: Low-level: inline Yul, CREATE2, delegatecall, selfdestruct
capabilities.chain_specific: L2: Arbitrum, OP, zkSync, Blast, BSC quirks
capabilities.flashloans: Flash loan attack vectors and defenses
capabilities.dos_audit: DoS: unbounded loops, gas griefing, block gas limit
capabilities.access_control: Ownership, roles, centralization risks, emergency functions

audit_pipeline: 1. Fetch master skill index from evm-audit-master/SKILL.md
3. Select 5-8 relevant checklists using routing table
4. Spawn parallel sub-agent per checklist domain
5. Each agent walks checklist → writes findings-{domain}.md
7. File GitHub issues for Medium severity and above

severity_levels.CRITICAL: Direct loss of funds, protocol insolvency
severity_levels.HIGH: Conditional loss of funds, privilege escalation
severity_levels.MEDIUM: Unexpected behavior, griefing, minor fund loss

rules: Select additional checklists based on contract type
Every finding must include: severity, location, description, recommendation
Never use DEX spot prices as oracles — Chainlink or TWAP only
Always use SafeERC20 for token operations
Run slither static analysis before any audit conclusion
